title: Infinity Decor® 50mm Round Thumb Turn & Emergency Release Lock- Privacy Thumb Twist Lock for Toilet/Bathroom WC Doors in 9 Premium Finishes (PVD Brass)
features: ✅Includes: 1 x Standard thumb turn with spindle and complete fixing screws.

✅Description: These standard thumb turns are made of high-quality zinc material which known for their long-lasting durability and they are corrosion resistance. It’s having attractive PVD brass finish which offers a modern twist to your interior doors. Our thumb turn offers privacy on internal bathroom or bedroom doors with the benefit of coin release for emergency release on the exterior of the door.

✅Quality: They are manufactured of high-quality zinc material using the zinc die casting method, ensuring long-term use durability. It has an ergonomic design which offers a comfortable grip, allowing you to easily open and close bedroom and bathroom doors without any effort.
✅Finish: This standard thumb turn has a premium PVD brass finish. The glossy surface provides a modern look to your interior doors and enhance the overall look and feel of your space.

✅Feature: This standard thumb turn can be used with any 5mm bathroom lock or dead bolt. This thumb turn has a twisted latch mechanism which offers privacy on internal bathroom or bedroom doors with the benefit of coin release for emergency release on the exterior of the door.
description: Standard Thumb-turn & Release - PVD Brass Finish Introducing our modern thumb turn, crafted with precision from high-quality zinc material that known for their long-lasting durability. The perfect PVD Brass finish gives a premium feel to your furniture. Thumb turn having twisted lock mechanism which offers privacy on internal bathroom or bedroom doors with the benefit of coin release for emergency release on the exterior of the door. Premium Construction: This standard thumb turn is manufactured from high quality zinc material using the zinc die casting method which makes them durable for a long-term use. Finish: This standard thumb turn has an attractive PVD brass finish which provides a modern look to your bathroom and bedroom doors. It has a substantial premium feel. Feature: This standard thumb turn can be used with any 5mm bathroom lock or dead bolt. This thumb turn having twisted latch mechanism which offers privacy on internal bathroom or bedroom doors with the benefit of coin release for emergency release on the exterior of the door. Easy Installation: It is extremely easy to install this thumb turn as it all the necessary fixings are supplied in each packaging. Now upgrade your doors with this elegant door standard thumb turn without the need for professional assistance. Pack Includes: 1 x Standard thumb turn and release Fixing spindle with required Screws Specifications: Material: Zinc Finish: PVD Brass Base Diameter: 52mm Thumb Turn Size: 30mm Spindle Size: 90 x 5mm
